reviews.review_description: Fun game with great physics

This is a game where you will come back often. The bow and arrow mechanics feel totally satisfying, warping to different positions and moving on the platforms gives the game also a tactical note. Especially good is the multiplayer mode, where you can chat with your friends and gather different positions on the playground to fight against the intruders together. Graphics, sound, fun factor, replay value, all very good. 

Highly recommended!

reviews.review_title: Might as well be a gun game
reviews.review_description:
There's a lot to love about this game. Great graphics. Great aiming mechanic. But two things kind of spoil the fun for me: 1) The power-ups turn it from an archery game into a machinegun game. With the "beam arrow" and  "quick reload" power-ups you're essentially using a semiautomatic that looks like a bow. The challenge and satisfaction of estimating the arc of your arrow and the future position of the enemy... all of that goes out the window. Just keep tapping the trigger as fast as you can, and one of your 500 shots will hit. 2) It takes a long, long time to lose if you're even half trying. I've played quite a few times now and only once did I actually lose - every other time I just got bored and quit because even though plenty of enemies get past me, the wall just keeps taking hits for wave after wave after wave. I'd much rather have the difficulty ramp up at, say, round 3, so that getting to round 4 would actually feel like an achievement. 
For all my criticisms, though, I don't regret downloading it. It's good fun to just mess around with a decent archery simulator in short stints.

Update: They've added a mandatory aim line. Even though there's a toggle switch for this in the settings, the aim line never goes away. You're now using a semiautomatic with a laser sight. For me, it takes all the fun out of the game.

Update: The aim line issue has been resolved. I'm not sure about other changes, but the developers seem to be super responsive which I very much appreciate. For me, this game is well worth the price for the fantastic controls and graphics. The actual  *game*, though - as in, the action of defending the gate for round after round - doesn't really do it for me. It needs to be harder, more varied, have some more structure... I don't know. Anyway, this is a bloody great archery simulator that does a lot with a limited platform like the Go.

Wow they did a great job porting this to a 3DOF HMD!  I played this on my rift 2 years ago for hours at a time and this looks just as good, and the controls aren’t bad for what they had to work with.  Best Buy on Go right now!!

I use a 64G Go and when positioned in curtain places the games has big frame drops. While still playable when things chug along, it slightly tarnished a great overall experience. I’m hoping for updates to make the game a bit more smooth in the future, and if so I’ll change my score to 4 stars.

So I Love this game, I think the bow games are so much fun, and this bow game is one of my favorites.  Great job porting over to the Go, and hope the devs continue to show more of what they do best Great Game

Buy it now! It's worth every single penny!! I just played for an hour and a half straight! Great environment, fun enemies, and really cool to see your stats after each wave! Can't wait to jump in some more and try the multiplayer!
Great graphics and challenging gameplay. I have been enjoying long sessions playing this game for the first time since buying the Oculus Go.
The game is great, But it as a habit of freezing up on you. When you get really far in a online match, Or it just mite be my internet.

It's a wave shooter, but you use arrows to kill monsters to protect  the gate. You can play solo or join multiplayer.
The best is the co-op multiplayer game mode. You have several spots to shoot arrows and you can be strategic with your partners in taking positions to kill the enemies.
VoIP enhances gameplay, and new elements as poweups add variety to the game.
More features are spected as final bosses and other improvements.
If you want to have fun with other players, that's the game to go.
Times flies playing it

Drop everything else and grab your bow and arrows. Time to defend the fortress. More fun than you can possibly imagine and I'm sure you can imagine quite a bit. But stay sharp you never know what's coming at you. 5 🌟 and improving. Great Dev.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your kind words!  We do indeed intend to keep making it better and better, so keep checking for updates!

reviews.review_description: Boring

This game is a great example of well designed VR game.
It's a game you will love and show to your friends.

You have everything you need for fun time! Solo, multiplayer, power ups, waves, a door to protect, great visuals, great sounds, lot of different enemies... You can even shoot arrows in your friends face!

I played the beta for hours and just played an hour online (before writing this). This game worth every $ and is one of the best game I played on the Oculus Go.

A must have game that I will never forget.


Short review
Visuals - great, detailed, various enemies

Gameplay - really easy to understand and hard to master. Good learning curve so you get better with time but still can get in easily first time you're playing.

Sounds - good sounds effect. Especially the first time you will hear a black mask coming!

Replayability - it's one map but each time you play it you will get the good feeling of successfully clearing waves! It doesn't get old. It's always stressful and meeting new players makes it new again.

I love this game! It looks great, plays great, and has little to no issues! 
First off, the idea of this is amazing. Many different enemies swoop on in, with a great variety. The visuals are insanely good looking, and I always have a blast trying to scope a monster with my bow and arrow! Never had any issues with firing, and the aiming system worked flawlessly. I love the upgrades between each level, and each type adds a little strategy toward it. The attention to detail is also great. Like when you hit a monster shiels, and it doesn't die instantly, or when you shoot a flying monster (with the giant firebombs) and watching the bombs drop off killed. The different aiming points are placed perfectly, forcing you to move every now and then, though I will say that some are better than others, and not perfectly balanced. Overall, this game could use a campaign-sort of mode, and perhaps boss battles of some type during the wave mode, adding a certain depth to it (each boss could have a short cutscene or something like that). It could also definitely use some visual weapon upgrades like, after enough straight arrow upgrades, you could be carrying a crossbow or something like that. This also needs some more arenas, because after having the game for a little while the first map could become boring. Finally, this could use a little story to add more depth to the shooting. Nothing much, just a little something about the forces of evil are attacking the holy tree ;). Overall, a great game, and can't wait for more updates. Kudos to the dev for such a great job, and I appreciate all they have done to get this on to the store!

I have to only give this 4 stars because of the lack of information about how the game is played and that I cannot choose who I want to multilayer with.
Other than that it is a fun game to play and I am 53 yrs old, I do not enjoy machine gunning my way round a game or having to overthink a game.
Was it worth the purchase... A big yes from me and I wouldn't hesitate recommending this for all ages.

reviews.review_title: Great game but huge crashing issues
reviews.review_description:
This is a great game to play however there are some issues. 
I have never seen anyone else when playing in multiplayer mode, so this makes me wonder if it is working? 
You can get so far into the game, usually when you have earned loads of upgrades and you are getting top side of the hoardes then the game crashes. This is so frustrating for what is a good game.
Edit: any chance of a reply from developers?
Game is alsome must have

Ok so be aware its pretty bare bones still and it had massive crashing issues on the GO they busted their bottoms pumped out couple updates snd had it fixed almost overnight nothing carries over no real progression but dang its fun and when u find others in a game and work together its tons of fun prob is you gained nothing to make you wanna do it again except its fun and you will play again but it needs some stuff like a friends list some form of progression but i give it a 5 because i have faith in these devs they are active they listen and they work hard so maybe just call these the early days...So trend of new day new update im not fibbing one bit literally everyday theres A update and imo thats a good thing post launch support is strong so pick this up even with the bare bones nature boy is it fun with others and i have not met ONE jerk so while were a small community we are friendly come join us! Devs do a deal or drop price a bit while your still updating and adding to game 9.99 for me isnt anything im a working adult but to be fair thats a tough sell at that price there is alot of good games from .1.99-6.99$ help us grow i want more players this game is a snoozer solo with no progession or item system BUT is super fun even with randos everyone actually talks and is nice
Love this game. Moves at a great pace and is really fun working with other plays to defeat the monsters and protect the wall.
Very good graphic but I dropped it after few times. Boring and repetitive. I guess it could be better in multiplayer but solo.. not worthy the price
